market.advice: Broad, healthy uptrend into the open — SPY above its 50-day, breadth 66%, VIX calm at 16. Leadership has rotated toward financials, industrials, healthcare and staples while mega-cap semis consolidate. Normal position sizing is fine, but respect the Middle East / Strait of Hormuz oil headline risk and keep stops honored on extended names.

picks.thesis: Cleanest mega-cap setup on the board: tight VCP just 7% off highs with FY EPS +82% and revenue +21.8%, and TradingView independently rates it Strong Buy. Gemini/cloud momentum plus a 25x forward multiple make this the anchor large-cap.
strengths: TradingView Strong Buy confirms the technical read
Reasonable 25.4x forward P/E for the growth
risks: Mega-cap; needs market tailwind to run
Ad-cycle and AI-capex spend under scrutiny

picks.thesis: Cybersecurity leader breaking out of a tight VCP just 1.4% under its high, EPS +28.6% and revenue +20.1%. TradingView rates it Buy — a clean, un-extended entry right at the pivot.
risks: 48x forward P/E leaves little room for a miss
Firewall refresh cycle can be lumpy

picks.thesis: The AI-infrastructure bellwether has pulled back ~10% into a constructive VCP with RSI still a healthy 62 — an un-extended re-entry. EPS +214% and revenue +85% remain unmatched, and TradingView agrees with a Strong Buy.
strengths: Only 16.6x forward P/E on hyperscaler demand
risks: Any hyperscaler capex wobble hits hardest here
Semi group has been the pullback leader

picks.thesis: Off 7% from its high with AWS re-accelerating and retail margins expanding; EPS +74.8% and TradingView rates it Strong Buy. RSI 72 is warm, so scale in rather than chase.
Sitting at all-time highs with RS at the very top of the tape and a TradingView Strong Buy. The move is extended (RSI 70, at highs), so this is a strength-buy for trend-followers — use the stop.
risks: Extended: RSI 70 at highs, no VCP base
34x forward P/E is rich vs. 16-22% growth

picks.thesis: GLP-1 franchise leader in a calm VCP just 6% off highs with EPS +170% and revenue +55%. RSI 56 means plenty of room to run; TradingView rates it Buy.
risks: Any trial or pricing setback moves it hard

picks.thesis: Aerospace-parts compounder in a picture-perfect VCP 1.4% off highs, EPS +71% on aero-demand strength, RSI a restrained 54, and a TradingView Strong Buy. One of the cleanest industrial setups.
strengths: Tight base near highs, RSI 54 (room to run)
risks: 46x forward P/E prices in a lot

picks.thesis: Money-center bank breaking to new highs on the financials rotation with EPS +36%, a cheap 11.7x P/E, and a TradingView Strong Buy. Steepening curve and capital-market strength are the tailwinds.
strengths: Breakout to new high, TradingView Strong Buy
risks: RSI ~70 at the breakout — mildly extended

picks.thesis: Best-in-class bank at new highs with EPS +47% and revenue +30%, 14x earnings, and a TradingView Strong Buy. The fortress balance sheet leads the financials move.
risks: Already large — needs group to lead

picks.thesis: At new highs on a capital-markets and dealmaking rebound: EPS +92%, revenue +42%, 16x earnings, TradingView Strong Buy. Leverage to a reviving IPO/M&A cycle.
risks: Revenue tied to volatile trading/banking cycle

picks.thesis: Wealth-management-heavy franchise at new highs with EPS +32% and a TradingView Strong Buy — steadier earnings mix than the pure trading houses. RSI 60 is un-extended.
Energy-drink grower in a tight VCP right at highs with EPS +29% and revenue +27% — a defensive-growth breakout. TradingView rates it Buy; RSI 62 leaves room.
risks: 37x P/E premium for a beverage name

picks.thesis: Classic defensive leader in a VCP 2% off highs, RSI 57, TradingView Buy — the ballast pick if the Hormuz/oil headlines rattle risk assets. Steady mid-teens EPS growth.
strengths: Low-beta defensive with a clean base

picks.thesis: Top-tier E&P in a VCP with a very cheap 9.4x P/E and EPS +40% — direct leverage to firmer crude as Strait-of-Hormuz risk keeps a bid under oil. TradingView Buy.
risks: A Hormuz de-escalation would cool the trade

picks.thesis: Midstream/NGL infrastructure name breaking out just 1% off highs with EPS +143% and a TradingView Buy — fee-based energy exposure that's less commodity-whippy than E&Ps.
Best-of-breed mall REIT in a clean VCP with RSI a low 50 — genuinely un-extended — revenue +19% and a TradingView Buy. The real-estate rotation leader.
risks: 32.9x P/E is full for a REIT

picks.thesis: AI-networking leader that pulled back 8% into a VCP with RSI 55 — a cleaner entry than the semis. Revenue +35%, EPS +25%, TradingView Buy.
Healthcare turnaround breaking out near highs with EPS +63% off a low base and a cheap 12.6x P/E; TradingView Buy. The managed-care recovery pick, tailwinded by UnitedHealth's blowout print.
strengths: Sector sentiment lifted by UNH beat
risks: MLR/medical-cost trend is the swing factor

picks.thesis: Industrial-distribution compounder in a tight VCP 1.5% off highs, RSI 57, TradingView Buy — steady share-gain story with double-digit EPS growth.
Deep-value breakout to new highs on a 9.2x P/E with a TradingView Strong Buy — a re-rating candidate if the brand-momentum sticks. RSI 64 is constructive.
strengths: Breakout at highs, TradingView Strong Buy
risks: EPS/revenue slightly negative YoY — execution show-me

picks.thesis: Excellent trust-bank fundamentals (EPS +43%, TradingView Strong Buy) but RSI 82 is deeply overbought at new highs — wait for a pullback or tight flag rather than chase.
Fertility-benefits grower with EPS +71% and a 14x P/E, but RSI 90 is parabolic — a strong story that needs to digest. Watch for a base rather than buying the vertical.
strengths: Niche growth with expanding client base

picks.thesis: Rail on a strong breakout (EPS +26.5%, TradingView Buy) but RSI 77 is stretched — a good name on a pullback to the pivot. M&A-in-rails chatter adds optionality.
Data-cloud momentum is real (revenue +33.5%, TradingView Buy) and it's only 3% off highs, but RSI 82 and a 101x forward multiple make this a wait-for-the-dip name.

Strong momentum and a TradingView Strong Buy, but still 24% below its high and rebuilding a base — constructive on a confirmed higher-low, not yet a clean breakout. Crypto/retail-volume leverage cuts both ways.
risks: Still -24% from high — not a fresh breakout

picks.thesis: AI-server demand is explosive (EPS +282%, revenue +87.5%) but the stock is basing 11% off highs and TradingView rates it only Neutral — the tension is real. Wait for it to reclaim the pivot with the group.
risks: TradingView Neutral — technicals lag the story

picks.thesis: Vita Coco has strong growth (revenue +37%, EPS +61%, TradingView Buy) but is 11% off highs with RSI 38 — an oversold pullback in an uptrend. Buy the reclaim of the 50-day, not the falling knife.
risks: Still below the 50-day — needs to stabilize

picks.thesis: Defense prime with a solid setup and a geopolitical (Middle East) tailwind, but RSI 74 is extended into the move — prefer a pullback entry. Steady low-teens EPS growth and a strong backlog.
Cheniere is the LNG-export leader with a cheap 13x P/E and a Hormuz/energy-security tailwind, but it's 13.6% off highs with RSI 71 — a rebound-in-progress. Confirm the reclaim before sizing up.
risks: RSI 71 warm for a name off its highs

picks.thesis: Liquidia (Yutrepia PAH launch) has a clean chart just 4.5% off highs and a TradingView Buy, but it's a small-cap specialty-pharma binary — size small and lead with the launch thesis, not the quant score.
